name: predictor-bridge
description: Ethereum bridging contract for Predictor Network
author: Predictor Foundation

scripts.format: npm run pretty:fix && npm run pretty:sol && npm run pretty:docs
scripts.deploy:bridge:dev: cross-env BRIDGE_ENV=dev npx hardhat run deploy/deploy-bridge.js --network sepolia
scripts.deploy:bridge:testnet: cross-env BRIDGE_ENV=testnet npx hardhat run deploy/deploy-bridge.js --network sepolia
scripts.deploy:bridge:testnet:resettable: cross-env BRIDGE_ENV=testnet BRIDGE_CONTRACT=PredictorBridgeResettable npx hardhat run deploy/deploy-bridge.js --network sepolia
scripts.deploy:bridge:mainnet: cross-env BRIDGE_ENV=mainnet npx hardhat run deploy/deploy-bridge.js --network mainnet
scripts.deploy:implementation:dev: cross-env BRIDGE_ENV=dev npx hardhat run deploy/deploy-implementation.js --network sepolia
scripts.deploy:implementation:testnet: cross-env BRIDGE_ENV=testnet npx hardhat run deploy/deploy-implementation.js --network sepolia
scripts.deploy:implementation:mainnet: cross-env BRIDGE_ENV=mainnet npx hardhat run deploy/deploy-implementation.js --network mainnet
